title: stipa khovdensis
intro: Stipa khovdensis, also known as Khovd feather grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stipa khovdensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
